rulings.Case Title: FRANCES PINNOCK VS. LINDA WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF FRANCES PINNOCK'S Motion for Atty's Fees Deny, Premature. Cross complaint was not dismissed and there is no judgment entered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH LEE et al VS. NARANJIBHAI R PATEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS NARANJIBHAI PATEL and INDIRABEN PATEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 1-7 and 9 to specify which plaintiffs are alleging those causes of action, dates of tenancies, time frame of alleged violation and facts re entitlement to punitive damages where applicable. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. JAN SAMZELIUS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JAN SAMZELIUS'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENY, no authority. Unlawful detainter is duplicative and/or should be stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Grant with 5 days leave to amend to state proper date damages commenced. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT KRZYSZTOF KONDRACIUK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with 5 days leave to amend to attach 3 day notice to complaint. = (501/REQ)
Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 30, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF DEIRDE FRONTCZAK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing required. = (501/REQ)
